task.instruction: You are feeling cold and notice that the fan direction is currently towards your head, but you want the warm air to blow toward your feet instead for better warmth. Ask the assistant to change the fan airflow direction to blow toward your feet. You want the air directed to your feet specifically, not a combination with head or windshield. Additionally, you also don't feel much airflow so you want to increase the fan speed by one level. Make the airflow direction and fan speed request in one message.
